message:
feat(stdlib): add logging, threading, queue, html, urllib modules

- logging: debug/info/warning/error/critical, getLogger, handlers
- threading: Thread, Lock, RLock, Condition, Semaphore, Event, Barrier
- queue: Queue, LifoQueue, PriorityQueue with thread-safe operations
- html: escape/unescape for HTML entity encoding
- urllib.parse: urlparse, quote/unquote, urljoin, parse_qs
